scope: Apply-gated GitHub transport for the fresh current multi-step Tau command-loop terminal handoff.

redaction.reason: Copied GitHub auth preflight stdout included masked token metadata; token/status lines were redacted in committed proof copies.
redaction.scan: Secret-token prefix and auth-token metadata scan returned no proof-directory matches after redaction.

proves: The terminal next:human handoff from the fresh current multi-step command-loop receipt can be applied to GitHub as a real issue in grahama1970/tau.
The applied transport created issue #21 with next:human/executor:human labels before proof disposition.
The proof-only issue was closed after artifact capture and no Tau issues remained open.
does_not_prove: semantic correctness of Memory answers or COMPLIANCE evidence cases
human acceptance of the created next:human route
browser UI rendering for this proof slice
